subcodes.first_line: Say: O Concourse of Creation! By God, the True One, the Glory hath come unto you to purify you from selfish desire and draw you nigh unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا ملاء الانشاء تالله الحق قد جائکم البها لیطهرکم عن الهوی و یقربکم الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @chastisement and requital
